citation: Malaysian Code of Advertising Practice — Rule 2 (Identification)
summary: Advertorial and sponsored social content must be clearly identified as paid advertising.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: KOL posts, paid reviews, or branded editorial content. ACTION: REWRITE — add sponsorship identification. CHECK: Platform ad tools, #ad labels, and Bahasa/English disclosure. ESCALATE IF: Undisclosed paid promotion presented as organic opinion.
